title: allium geyeri
intro: Allium geyeri, also known as Geyer's onion or wild onion, is a perennial plant species in the Allium genus, characterized by its small, white or pinkish flowers and edible leaves. The medicinal properties of Allium geyeri include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of consuming Allium geyeri include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusion, where the leaves and flowers are steeped in hot water to make a tea that can be consumed for its medicinal properties.
